reviews.review_description: Yes, I knew that New Folder was cooking something special. My expectation was justified. It's a very juicy and thoughtful game, with attention to detail. My thrill was to perform on stage in front of the audience and rock the crowd. Play billiards and hit people with a bowling ball. Dance on the dance floor, and smash the stall of the occupied toilet. A bunch of very interesting items. I recommend it!

Great game! The kids absolutely loved the janitor/cleaning game. When the VR headset batteries died, they went and started cleaning the apartment themselves. 😄 top 10/10.  I only had a little time to play it myself, but the cleaning mechanics are excellent and the atmosphere is really well done!
This is so fun like how do they do this!?
